items.title: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.summary: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
